ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Neural network architecture used (e.g., CNN, RNN, LSTM) */,
  "architecture_version" TEXT /* Version of the neural network architecture used */,
  "hidden_neurons" INTEGER /* Number of hidden neurons in the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of performance metric (e.g., training accuracy, validation accuracy, inference time) */,
  "macs" REAL /* Number of Multiply-Accumulate operations (MACs) */,
  "on_chip_mem_used" REAL /* On-chip memory usage */,
  "off_chip_mem_used" REAL /* Off-chip memory usage */,
  "inference_time" REAL /* Inference time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model configuration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the configuration belongs to */,
  "configuration_type" TEXT /* Type of configuration (e.g., hyperparameters, model architecture) */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Model configuration details (e.g., hyperparameters) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_configurations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher belongs to */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher (e.g., university, research institution) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., lead researcher, collaborator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_sharing" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shared model */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being shared */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher sharing the model */,
  "share_type" TEXT /* Type of share (e.g., public, private, collaboration) */,
  "share_message" TEXT /* Message or description for the shared model */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date the model was shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_sharing_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_sharing_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the comment belongs to */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher making the comment */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., question, suggestion, feedback) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment text */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being rated */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher making the rating */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., accuracy, performance, usability) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating value (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_ratings_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_ratings_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the tag belongs to */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag text (e.g., CNN, image classification) */,
  "tag_category" TEXT /* Category of the tag (e.g., architecture, application, technique) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_tags_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researcher_collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher initiating the collaboration */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborating researcher */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., co-author, contributor) */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date the collaboration was initiated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_collaborations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
